en: all the others went and cashed out, we got the subdivision all mapped out, it'll sit
right here on this land, and you can leave town a rich man, and he said, boys, whatever
ko: 그러면 당신은 부자가 되어 이 마을을 떠날 수 있어.

en: you're offering, it won't be enough, cause I got a little girl that used to swing right
there, I still see her pink bow and her brown hair, she's in the big city, but she still
ko: 아직도 그 아이의 분홍 리본과 갈색 머리카락이 보여.

en: calls home, what's she gonna do if she comes back and we're gone, and over there under
that white oak tree, beneath the crosses where my best buddy's buried, lasted thirteen hunting
seasons running strong, keep your money cause a man can't leave his dog, and over there
ko: 돈은 가져가, 개를 두고 떠날 수는 없으니까.

en: is where I got down on one knee, you can't buy that kind of dirt cheap, one man smiled
